alkylation reagent: alkylated with 100 mM acrylamide at 25 °C for 1 h
alkylation concentration: alkylated with 100 mM acrylamide at 25 °C for 1 h
cleavage agent: the solutions were incubated at 37 °C for overnight digestion
enrichment method: we used TUBE2 agarose beads to immunoprecipitate ubiquitinated proteins
instrument: coupled to an Orbitrap Fusion Lumos mass spectrometer
reduction reagent: reduced with 10 mM DTT at 37 °C for 45 min
reduction concentration: reduced with 10 mM DTT at 37 °C for 45 min
